mapper.select: SELECT A2.ID, A2.TRUST_ID, A2.TRUST_CARGO_INFO_ID, A2.CARGO_INFO_ID, A2.TARGET_CARGO_INFO_ID, A2.PROCESS_CODE, A2.PROCESS_NAME, A2.PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, A2.PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, A2.PIECE_WORK_TEAM_ID, A2.DEPT_ID, A2.DEPT_NAME, A2.CARGO_CODE, A2.CARGO_NAME, A2.SPEC_CODE, A2.SPEC_NAME, A2.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, A2.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, A2.HATCH, A2.STOREHOUSE_ID_SOURCE, A2.STOREHOUSE_NAME_SOURCE, A2.REGION_ID_SOURCE, A2.REGION_NAME_SOURCE, A2.MASS_ID_SOURCE, A2.MASS_NAME_SOURCE, A2.STOREHOUSE_ID_TARGET, A2.STOREHOUSE_NAME_TARGET, A2.REGION_ID_TARGET, A2.REGION_NAME_TARGET, A2.MASS_ID_TARGET, A2.MASS_NAME_TARGET, A2.CAR_COUNT, A2.QUANTITY, A2.TON, A2.REMARK, A2.CREATE_BY, A2.CREATE_BY_NAME, A2.CREATE_TIME, A2.UPDATE_BY, A2.UPDATE_BY_NAME, A2.UPDATE_TIME, A2.WORK_HOUR, A2.START_TIME, A2.END_TIME, A4.IS_SETTLE FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET A1 LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL A2 ON A1.ID = A2.WORK_TICKET_ID LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS A3 ON A2.PROCESS_CODE = A3.PROCESS_CD LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS A4 ON A2.PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE = A4.PROCESS_CD WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID IN (SELECT ID FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}) AND (A3.TARGET_CD = '05' OR A3.SOURCE_CD = '05')

SELECT ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PIECE_PROJECT_CODE, PIECE_PROJECT_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, USER_BY, USER_BY_NAME, COEFFICIENT, SALARY_PRICE_ID, PRICE, QUANTITY, TON, AMOUNT, SALARY_STATUS_CODE, SALARY_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, SALARY_SUMMARY_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, EXAMINE_BY, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_TIME FROM T_PRD_SALARY where WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT ID, PORT_STORAGE_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, INOUT_TYPE, INOUT_STORAGE_CODE, INOUT_STORAGE_NAME, WORK_TICKET_ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, CARGO_TALLY_ID, CARGO_TALLY_DETAIL_ID, INOUT_DATE, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CLEAN_MASS_SIGN FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL where WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update.foreach:
UPDATE T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL SET TON = #{item.ton,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{item.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{item.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{item.now}
id = #{item.id}

UPDATE T_PRD_SALARY SET TON = #{item.ton,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{item.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{item.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{item.now}
id = #{item.id}

mapper.select:
SELECT TPWTD.ID, TPWT.ID "tpwtId", TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID, TBT.TRUST_NO, TPWT.WORK_DATE, TPWT.CLASS_CODE, TPWT.CLASS_NAME, TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE "shipVoyageName", TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TPWTD.CARGO_NAME, TPWTD.CARGO_CODE, TPWTD.PROCESS_CODE, TPWTD.PROCESS_NAME, TPWTD.PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, TPWTD.PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, TPWTD.CARGO_CODE, TPWTD.DEPT_ID, TPWTD.DEPT_NAME, TPWT.PERSONNEL_ID, TPWT.PERSONNEL_NAME, TPWTD.WORK_TON, TPWTD.TON, TPWTD.QUANTITY, TPWTD.PERSONNEL_ID, TPWTD.STOREHOUSE_NAME_SOURCE||'/'||TPWTD.REGION_NAME_SOURCE||'/'||TPWTD.MASS_NAME_SOURCE SRMS, TPWTD.STOREHOUSE_NAME_TARGET||'/'||TPWTD.REGION_NAME_TARGET||'/'||TPWTD.MASS_NAME_TARGET SRMT, TPWTD.START_TIME, TPWTD.END_TIME, TPWTE.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME,
TPWTE.EQUIPMENT_NO FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD ON TPWTD.WORK_TICKET_ID = TPWT.ID and TPWT.TYPE = '1' LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TPWTD.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID left join T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS on TDS.ID = TPWTD.SHIPVOYAGE_ID left join T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI on TDSI.ID = TPWTD.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ( select REGEXP_REPLACE( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR( EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME ),'([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, REGEXP_REPLACE( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR( EQUIPMENT_NO ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY EQUIPMENT_NO ),'([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) EQUIPMENT_NO ,WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_EQUIPMENT GROUP BY WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID ) TPWTE ON TPWTD.ID= TPWTE.WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID
TPWTD.DEPT_ID IS NOT NULL and TICKET_TYPE = '2'
AND TPWTD.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipItemID,jdbcType=BIGINT}
ORDER BY TPWT.WORK_DATE ASC, TPWT.CLASS_CODE ASC

SELECT ID, TRUST_ID, WORK_TICKET_ID, TRUST_CARGO_INFO_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, TARGET_CARGO_INFO_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, PIECE_WORK_TEAM_ID, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, SPEC_CODE, SPEC_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, HATCH, STOREHOUSE_ID_SOURCE, STOREHOUSE_NAME_SOURCE, REGION_ID_SOURCE, REGION_NAME_SOURCE, MASS_ID_SOURCE, MASS_NAME_SOURCE, STOREHOUSE_ID_TARGET, STOREHOUSE_NAME_TARGET, REGION_ID_TARGET, REGION_NAME_TARGET, MASS_ID_TARGET, MASS_NAME_TARGET, CAR_COUNT, QUANTITY, TON, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, WORK_HOUR, TO_CHAR(START_TIME,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') START_TIME, TO_CHAR(END_TIME,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') END_TIME, GROUP_ID, GROUP_NAME, PERSONNEL_ID, PERSONNEL_NAME, WORK_TON FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL where ID IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT SUM(QUANTITY) QUANTITY, SUM(TON) TON FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS MWP ON MWP.PROCESS_CD = TPWTD.PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE AND MWP.IS_TALLY_TON = '1' WHERE WORK_TICKET_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY WORK_TICKET_ID
SELECT * FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET where ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update:
update T_PRD_WORK_TICKET SET TON = #{ton,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QUANTITY = #{quantity, jdbcType=BIGINT}
ID = #{workTicketId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select IS_TALLY_TON FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select WORK_PLAN_ID FROM T_PRD_WORK_TICKET WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID,DEPT_NAME,DEPT_LEVEL,IS_MACHINE FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID = (SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) CONNECT BY PRIOR PARENT_ID=ID) WHERE DEPT_LEVEL = '2'
